summary: This document outlines the Standard Operating Procedure for Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA) within the company's Quality Management System. It details the qualification process, scoring criteria, and root cause analysis methods like the Five Whys for addressing non-conformities in software or marketing. The procedure emphasizes compliance with medical device regulatory requirements and safety performance standards.
